untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'consecutive periods close in direction of trend' (consecutive_closes_required=5) and '75th percentile volume threshold' which cannot be directly expressed with allowed indicators and operators. Vol_ratio_20 approximates volume strength but does not encode percentile thresholds or consecutive-bar logic. ATR-based price extension (1.5 ATR) approximated using atr_14 comparison.
translation_notes: Mapped positive feedback/imitative behavior to ADX>25 (trend strength), volume confirmation to vol_ratio_20 (above median), and swing-based exits to pivot points (s1/r1). Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification. Consecutive close logic and exact percentile volume filtering require custom backtester logic.
